comments.author: github-actions
comments.body: **Dignified Code Simplifier Review**: Using `chr(10)` instead of `"\n"` reduces code clarity - prefer simple string literals for readability. Replace with `"\n".join(issue_queries)`

comments.author: schrockn
comments.body:
Replaced chr(10) with extracted `joined_queries` variable using "
".join() for clarity.

_Addressed via `/erk:pr-address` at 2026-02-25 05:55 PST_

comments.author: github-actions
comments.body: **Test Coverage**: New method `get_issues_by_numbers_with_pr_linkages` with complex business logic (GraphQL query building, response parsing) lacks unit tests. Recommend adding tests in `tests/unit/gateways/github/test_real.py` following the pattern of existing tests (e.g., `test_parse_plan_prs_*`).

comments.author: schrockn
comments.body:
Added tests for _build_issues_by_numbers_query (single/multiple issues) and _parse_issues_by_numbers_response (single issue, multiple issues, null nodes, empty repository).

_Addressed via `/erk:pr-address` at 2026-02-25 05:55 PST_

comments.author: github-actions
comments.body: **Test Coverage**: New method `fetch_plans_by_ids` with business logic lacks unit tests. This method orchestrates multiple operations (GitHub API calls, plan parsing, worktree mapping). Recommend adding unit tests covering the main logic path and edge cases (empty plan_ids, missing plans).

comments.author: schrockn
comments.body:
Added 3 tests for fetch_plans_by_ids: empty plan_ids returns empty, fetches matching issues correctly, results sorted by plan_id.

_Addressed via `/erk:pr-address` at 2026-02-25 05:55 PST_

comments.author: github-actions
comments.body: **Test Coverage**: New function `_extract_plan_ids_from_roadmap` lacks unit tests. This function parses roadmap frontmatter and extracts plan IDs. Recommend adding unit tests to `tests/tui/screens/test_objective_plans_screen.py` with various roadmap formats and edge cases.

comments.author: schrockn
comments.body:
Added 5 tests for _extract_plan_ids_from_roadmap covering: empty body, no roadmap block, single PR, multiple PRs, null PR skipping.

_Addressed via `/erk:pr-address` at 2026-02-25 05:55 PST_
